headline: **MLB Daily Recap: May 4, 2026**
article:
The New York Mets secured a 4-2 victory over the Colorado Rockies, with Carson Benge leading the offense and Juan Mejia making a strong pitching appearance. The Boston Red Sox edged the Detroit Tigers 5-4, with Payton Tolle earning the win and Jarren Duran leading the Red Sox offense. The Tampa Bay Rays shut down the Toronto Blue Jays 5-1, with Nick Martinez earning the win and Ryan Vilade leading the Blue Jays with a home run and 3 RBIs.

Several key players are dealing with injuries, including Gabe Speier, who has been placed on the 15-day injured list by the Seattle Mariners due to left shoulder inflammation. The San Francisco Giants have also placed Erik Miller on the 15-day injured list with a low back strain. Other notable injuries include Tanner Murray's left shoulder dislocation and Austin Hays' left calf strain.

The Atlanta Braves traded catcher Jonah Heim to the Athletics for cash, while the Washington Nationals traded third baseman Zack Short to the Detroit Tigers for cash. The Toronto Blue Jays traded second baseman Tyler Fitzgerald to the Los Angeles Dodgers for cash.

top_news.title: **Mets Take Down Rockies 4-2**
top_news.summary: The New York Mets secured a 4-2 victory over the Colorado Rockies, with Carson Benge leading the offense with a home run and 1 RBI. Juan Mejia made a strong pitching appearance, striking out 5 batters in 2 innings of work.

top_news.title: **Red Sox Edge Tigers in Thrilling 5-4 Victory**
top_news.summary: The Boston Red Sox took down the Detroit Tigers 5-4, with Payton Tolle earning the win after 7.0 innings of scoreless relief. Jarren Duran led the Red Sox offense with 3 hits, including a home run, and 3 RBIs.

top_news.title: **Rays Shut Down Blue Jays 5-1**
top_news.summary: The Tampa Bay Rays secured a 5-1 victory over the Toronto Blue Jays, with Nick Martinez earning the win after pitching 5.0 innings with 4 strikeouts and 1 earned run. Ryan Vilade led the Blue Jays with 1 home run and 3 RBIs.

top_news.title: **Phillies Take Down Marlins in Shutout**
top_news.summary: The Philadelphia Phillies secured a 1-0 victory over the Miami Marlins, with Aaron Nola pitching 6.0 innings of scoreless baseball. Bryce Harper led the Phillies' offense with a 3-hit, 1-home run performance.

top_news.title: **Rockies Shut Down Mets in Scoreless Tie**
top_news.summary: The Colorado Rockies secured a 0-0 victory over the New York Mets, marking a scoreless tie in the game.

top_news.title: **Mariners Place Gabe Speier on 15-Day Injured List**
top_news.summary: Seattle Mariners left-handed pitcher Gabe Speier has been placed on the 15-day injured list due to left shoulder inflammation, effective retroactive to May 3, 2026.

top_news.title: **Braves Make Roster Move**
top_news.summary: The Atlanta Braves have traded catcher Jonah Heim to the Athletics for cash.
